texto: I used to play chess when I was a kid and participate in national-level tournaments with the geekiest guys. This one time, I was losing terribly, so I batted my eyelashes and flirted as I asked for a draw. My dad just couldn't believe it. He thought, 'What have I created, a floozy?' But it worked!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jordana Spiro que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “I used to play chess when I was a kid and participate in national-level tournaments with the geek…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, time, losing, com foco em trabalho e losing.
